description_long: This is a compact industrial wireless smart gateway, designed for use in power and control systems. The front panel features multiple LED indicators for status, LAN, and communication ports, as well as two serial COM ports, a LAN port, and reset button. The top of the unit has a green terminal block and an antenna connector, while the sides are mostly solid with mounting hardware visible. The rear panel displays a detailed manufacturer and compliance label, including MAC addresses, model information, and certification marks. The casing is primarily matte black metal with some plastic components, and the device is built for robust, secure installation in urban infrastructure. Its size and features suggest it is intended for DIN rail or panel mounting in control cabinets or utility enclosures.
description: A compact industrial wireless smart gateway with LED indicators, serial and LAN ports, and a detailed manufacturer label, housed in a matte black metal casing.
description_view_0: Front view showing LED indicators, serial COM ports, LAN port, reset button, and status labels.
description_view_1: Top view highlighting the green terminal block, antenna connector, and solid black casing.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the mounting hardware and the solid, unadorned side panel.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring a large manufacturer and compliance label with technical details and MAC addresses.
